description: CASE with a nullable branch makes the entire expression nullable even if ELSE is non-null

columns.name: info
columns.note: bio branch is nullable, making the whole CASE nullable

name: case_nullable_branch
query_sql:
-- @name GetUserInfo
-- @returns :many
SELECT CASE WHEN status = 'active' THEN bio ELSE 'none' END AS info FROM users
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, bio TEXT, age INTEGER, score NUMERIC, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
